final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial fashion photo of a tall Nordic female model on Iceland's black sand beach.

Style/medium: editorial fashion photography in the spirit of Vogue Italia, medium format, 85mm lens, f/2 aperture, photorealistic
Composition: medium shot with model as focal point, natural framing with basalt columns
Subject: tall Nordic female model wearing a black leather trench coat from a top designer brand, white turtleneck sweater, chunky-heeled leather boots, strong posture, profile view looking into the distance, long hair blown by sea wind
Scene/backdrop: Iceland black sand beach with basalt column formations, waves crashing on rocks, sea mist in the air, overcast lead-gray sky
Lighting/mood: natural overcast daylight, soft diffused light, moody and dramatic atmosphere
Color palette: unified dark tones with black sand, black clothing, and lead-gray sky as base, white turtleneck as accent, cool color grading with high contrast
Materials/textures: smooth leather coat with subtle sheen, knit texture of turtleneck, rough volcanic rock surfaces, wet sand, fine film grain
Avoid: oversaturated colors, warm tones, bright sunlight, plastic-looking textures, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
